name: Marianne Lake
background: Ms. Lake has been CEO of Consumer & Community Banking since 2024. She was Co-CEO of Consumer & Community Banking from 2021 to 2024 and CEO of Consumer Lending from 2019 to 2021. She served as CFO of the firm from 2013 to 2019.

company_affiliations.name: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: CEO, Consumer & Community Banking (and various prior senior executive roles within the firm)
